name: codsworth
description: Plugin marketplace for Codsworth — build-verify-fix tools for Claude Code

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Codebase-aware specification engine with spec-type detection (GREENFIELD/MIGRATION/BUG_FIX/REFACTOR), enforced source-inventory enumeration for migrations, and pre-interview domain scouting (v3.2.0 R0.B DOMAIN) that researches the feature category in the ecosystem before the interviewer asks the user a single question. Forge plans. Foundry builds.

plugins.name: foundry
plugins.description: Autonomous build-verify-fix loop with pre-authored teammate prompts (v3.0.0 router architecture), migration mode with coverage-diff stream (v3.1.0), handoff audit log + spec-hash gate + gated acceptance (v3.2.0), drift-prevention triad — global_invariants + mandatory_rules + requirement-ID citation — with stall watchdog and sharpened orchestrator imperative (v3.3.0), 6-stream verification, defect grinding, spec-before-code assay, and research compliance. Forge plans. Foundry builds.
